channel.title: rust on Techiedeepdive
channel.description: Recent content in rust on Techiedeepdive

item.title: rustlang - Hello world
item.description: Cargo cargo package manager can be used to create standard structure for rust application. cargo ini To build cargo build To build opt binary: cargo build --release We can build and run binary with cargo run Creating first rust module To create a module, create file under src/. For this example, the module name is print.rs pub fn run(){ println!("Hello there") } and that module can be imported into main using mod print
